## ADR Decisions

No ADR-type documents were present in this ingest set. The PRECEDENCE order is
ADR > SPEC > PRD > DOC, but no documents were classified as ADR.

All authoritative decisions below are derived from SPEC and PRD sources. They
carry SPEC or PRD precedence, not ADR-level locking, and may be superseded by
a future ADR ingest.

---

## Design Decisions (SPEC-level authority)

### DECISION-001: Framework and language
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/README.md (PRD)
status: proposed
decision: The design system is implemented in React with TypeScript. Component
  output targets a React + TypeScript codebase. No other framework is in scope
  for this ingest.
scope: all-components

### DECISION-002: Styling approach — CSS custom properties for theming
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/README.md (PRD)
status: proposed
decision: All color, spacing, radius, shadow, motion, and typography tokens are
  defined as CSS custom properties on :root, with overrides under body.dark.
  Tailwind utility classes are used for layout and spacing; token values are
  referenced as var(--token-name). No JS recompute of colors on theme switch.
scope: design-tokens, theming, all-components

### DECISION-003: Light/dark mode mechanism
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/README.md (PRD)
status: proposed
decision: Theme toggle adds/removes class="dark" on <body>. CSS custom
  properties are redefined under body.dark { ... } and cascade automatically.
  User preference is persisted in localStorage.
scope: theming

### DECISION-004: Always-dark surfaces use hardcoded values, not theme tokens
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/README.md (PRD)
status: proposed
decision: Surfaces that must remain dark in both light and dark mode (e.g. code
  blocks, 500 error pages, dark cards) MUST use hardcoded #1c1917 bg with
  #f5f3f0 text — NOT var(--cream) / var(--ink). This prevents dark-mode from
  flipping both bg AND text into cream-on-cream unreadability.
scope: theming, Surface, DarkSurface, StatusPage

### DECISION-005: Inverted pill / badge chrome pattern
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/README.md (PRD)
status: proposed
decision: Badge/pill chrome that intentionally inverts between modes pairs
  var(--ink) bg with var(--cream) text. Both tokens flip together in dark mode,
  maintaining readability without separate dark-mode overrides.
scope: Badge, Chip, InvertedPill

### DECISION-006: Icon conventions
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/README.md (PRD)
status: proposed
decision: All icons use 1.5px stroke, 24x24 viewBox, stroke="currentColor".
  The codebase may substitute Lucide, Heroicons, or Phosphor for inline SVGs
  provided line-weight matches. Verbatim SVG paths from ds-iconset.jsx are also
  acceptable.
scope: icons, all-components

### DECISION-007: No raster assets
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/README.md (PRD)
status: proposed
decision: Every visual in the system is SVG or CSS. No PNG, JPEG, or WebP
  imagery in component library output.
scope: all-components, illustrations, icons

### DECISION-008: Accessibility target
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/README.md (PRD)
status: proposed
decision: WCAG 2.2 AAA for body text; AA-or-better for UI elements. Every
  interactive element must have a visible focus ring using
  --focus-ring: 0 0 0 3px rgba(245,158,11,.45) (light) /
  0 0 0 3px rgba(251,191,36,.5) (dark). Run axe-core after each screen lands.
scope: all-components, accessibility

### DECISION-009: Reduced motion
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/README.md (PRD)
status: proposed
decision: All animation respects prefers-reduced-motion: reduce. Animations cap
  at 200ms or fall back to instant state changes.
scope: motion, all-components

### DECISION-010: ColorPicker sub-parts
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-colorpicker.jsx (SPEC)
status: proposed
decision: ColorPicker exposes six interactive sub-parts: gradient
  saturation/brightness area (150px height, crosshair cursor), hue bar
  (12px height, rainbow gradient), opacity bar (12px height, checkerboard
  + color gradient), hex input (monospace, validates #RRGGBB), alpha input
  (read-only display), and preset swatches grid. Each sub-part is independently
  operable and keyboard-reachable.
scope: ColorPicker

### DECISION-011: ColorPicker preset palette and tonal strips
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-colorpicker.jsx (SPEC)
status: proposed
decision: Ten preset swatches: amber (#f59e0b), red (#ef4444), blue (#3b82f6),
  purple (#8b5cf6), green (#22c55e), pink (#ec4899), cyan (#06b6d4),
  orange (#f97316), teal (#14b8a6), indigo (#6366f1). Three tonal strips:
  Amber (8 stops light-to-dark), Blue (8 stops), Neutral (8 stops matching
  cream/ink system).
scope: ColorPicker

### DECISION-012: ConfirmDialog tone system
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-confirmdialog.jsx (SPEC)
status: proposed
decision: Four tones — danger (var(--red), triangle-warning icon, red primary
  button), warn (var(--amber-d), circle-info icon, amber primary button),
  success (var(--green), checkmark icon, amber "dark" primary button), neutral
  (var(--ink), info-circle icon, dark primary button). Tone governs: icon,
  icon-background tint, and confirm button color. Cancel button is always the
  default ds-btn style.
scope: ConfirmDialog

### DECISION-013: TypeToConfirm pattern for irreversible actions
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-confirmdialog.jsx (SPEC)
status: proposed
decision: Destructive actions with no recovery path require the user to type a
  confirmation word (default "DELETE") before the destructive button becomes
  enabled. Confirm button uses var(--red) bg when enabled, var(--ink-5) at
  60% opacity when disabled.
scope: TypeToConfirm, ConfirmDialog

### DECISION-014: DataGrid column schema and interaction model
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-datagrid.jsx (SPEC)
status: proposed
decision: Column schema includes: key, label, width (px), sortable (bool),
  align ("left" | "right"). Sorting is single-column, toggling asc/desc on
  repeated click. Column resize uses mouse drag on a 6px-wide right-edge
  handle, min-width 60px. Row selection via checkbox column. Bulk-action bar
  slides in above table when selection is non-empty. Pagination in footer with
  prev/next arrows and page number buttons.
scope: DataGrid

### DECISION-015: DataGrid status-to-badge mapping
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-datagrid.jsx (SPEC)
status: proposed
decision: Status values map to ds-badge modifier classes:
  applied → "upcoming", interviewing → "done", offer → "passed",
  rejected → "pending". Priority values map to dot colors:
  high → var(--red-vivid), medium → var(--amber-vivid), low → var(--green-vivid).
scope: DataGrid, Badge

### DECISION-016: Sparkline SVG geometry
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-dataviz.jsx (SPEC)
status: proposed
decision: Sparkline is a pure SVG polyline with optional fill path (10% opacity).
  Default dimensions: 100x28px. Stroke 1.5px, strokeLinecap="round",
  strokeLinejoin="round". Terminal dot is a filled circle r=2.5. Y-axis
  normalizes to [2, height-2] range (2px padding top/bottom). Accepts color
  prop as any CSS color or token.
scope: Sparkline

### DECISION-017: MiniDonut SVG geometry
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-dataviz.jsx (SPEC)
status: proposed
decision: MiniDonut uses two concentric SVG circles. Track circle uses
  var(--cream-2). Progress arc uses strokeDasharray/strokeDashoffset for
  percentage fill, rotated -90deg so 0% starts at top. Default size 48px,
  strokeWidth 5px, transition 0.6s ease-out. Value label centered absolutely.
scope: MiniDonut

### DECISION-018: MiniBar layout model
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-dataviz.jsx (SPEC)
status: proposed
decision: MiniBar uses CSS flexbox (align-items: flex-end). Each bar column
  is a flex child with maxWidth 32px, height proportional to (value/max)*70%,
  minHeight 4px. Value label above bar (font-size 9px, --mono). Category label
  below (font-size 8px, --mono). Bar has 4px top border-radius only. Height
  transition 0.4s ease-out.
scope: MiniBar

### DECISION-019: CommandPalette trigger and keyboard contract
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-advanced.jsx (SPEC)
status: proposed
decision: CommandPalette opens on Cmd+K (Mac) / Ctrl+K (Windows/Linux) and
  closes on Escape. Overlay click also closes. Search is live fuzzy-filter
  across all items. Results grouped by category (Actions, Recent, Navigation).
  No-results state shows "No results for '...'" message. Opens at 15vh from
  top.
scope: CommandPalette

### DECISION-020: Pagination component variants
source: /Users/temp/Documents/workspace/design-system/design_handoff/design-system/ds-advanced.jsx (SPEC)
status: proposed
decision: Two pagination variants: full (prev arrow, numbered pages with
  ellipsis, next arrow, "Page N of M" label) and compact (prev arrow, "N / M"
  text, next arrow). Prev/next use ds-icbtn with disabled state on boundary.
  Active page uses ds-page-btn with "active" modifier class.
scope: Pagination
